rules.shared_tables: olympiad/core owns entity; others FK to it

setting_groups.description: Logical groups of admin settings and ownership metadata.

setting_definitions.description: Versionable setting definitions with schema and classification.

setting_change_requests.description: Approval workflow for critical setting changes.

audit_cases.description: Review case grouping one or more audit events for investigation or operations review.

security_incidents.description: Security/privacy incident register linked to audit events and remediation.

access_reviews.description: Periodic role/permission review records for staff and school users.

reconciliation_runs.description: Cross-module reconciliation run outputs and exception summaries.

audit_exports.description: Controlled export requests for audit evidence and compliance reviews.

certificate_templates.description: Versioned certificate template configuration and design assets.

certificate_eligibility_snapshots.description: Immutable eligibility snapshot from published Results Ops records.

certificate_requests.description: Controlled request workflow for generation, reissue, revocation or correction-impact action.

certificate_download_events.description: Append-only certificate download and verification event ledger.

certificate_events.description: Append-only certificate lifecycle, download and verification event ledger.

dashboard_preferences.description: Per-staff dashboard layout/filter preferences. No business state is changed by this module.

dashboard_alert_dismissals.description: User-level alert dismissals. Dismissing an alert hides it on dashboard but never resolves the source issue.

dashboard_snapshots.description: Optional cached KPI snapshots for performance. Must be scoped and regenerated server-side.

courier_events.description: Append-only courier tracking, receipt and reconciliation event ledger.

evaluation_answer_keys.description: Versioned answer key records for scoring.

evaluation_import_batches.description: OMR/answer-sheet scan or CSV import batch.

evaluation_candidate_responses.description: Candidate-level parsed responses from OMR/answer-sheet import.

evaluation_score_batches.description: Scoring run/version output for an import batch and final answer key.

evaluation_exceptions.description: Evaluation data-quality, parsing, scoring and approval exceptions.

exam_material_templates.description: Versioned material templates for question papers, answer sheets and download packages.

exam_material_packages.description: Generated material package for a school, slot, roster and content/template version.

exam_material_files.description: Private generated material files belonging to a material package.

exam_material_approvals.description: Maker-checker and dual approval records for high-risk material operations.

exam_material_download_events.description: Append-only download and print-event audit ledger.

exam_material_downloads.description: Immutable download audit ledger for all material file access.

exam_cycles.description: Exam cycle records used to group slots by olympiad, subject, grade and date window.

school_exam_slot_assignments.description: School-level assignment/confirmation to a specific exam slot.

exam_slot_reschedule_requests.description: Controlled reschedule workflow for school-slot assignments.

exam_slot_conflicts.description: Conflict reports for slot capacity, blackout, payment, roster, status and material impact checks.

exam_slot_events.description: Append-only event ledger for exam cycles, slots, assignments and reschedules.

exam_slot_bookings.description: School participation booking for an exam slot.

finance_invoices.description: School-level invoice records calculated from locked roster count, pricing, discounts, tax and commission rules.

finance_payment_links.description: Payment link records issued against invoice balance.

finance_payments.description: Payment confirmations from gateway/manual/bank transfer sources.

finance_adjustments.description: Discount, waiver, credit, refund and reversal request workflow.

finance_reconciliation_batches.description: Gateway/bank/manual payment reconciliation batches and exception tracking.

finance_events.description: Append-only finance event ledger for invoices, links, payments, adjustments and reconciliation.

notification_triggers.description: Event trigger definitions that map business events to templates and recipient scopes.

notification_batches.description: Batch records for event-triggered, manual and bulk notifications.

notification_recipients.description: Resolved recipient records for a notification batch.

notification_events.description: Normalized event created by business modules before delivery fan-out.

notification_deliveries.description: Per-recipient delivery queue and final delivery status.

omr_candidate_scores.description: Per-candidate parsed answers and scored rows generated from an OMR import.

payment_events.description: Immutable payment event ledger for provider webhooks, manual confirmations, reversals and reconciliation decisions.

export_files.description: Generated export file records and private download metadata.

export_download_events.description: Append-only download/access events for generated exports.

result_publications.description: Publication batch/control record for an olympiad/grade/school group.

result_batches.description: Result generation batch created from approved Evaluation Ops score batch.

candidate_results.description: Candidate-level immutable result records for active result batch version.

result_publication_windows.description: Publication schedule/window and target visibility for result batches.

result_rank_snapshots.description: Versioned rank snapshot records by ranking dimension.

portal_roles.description: Fixed MVP company portal role catalog mapped to Directus roles.

portal_permission_rules.description: Semantic permission matrix by role, module, action, scope and field restriction.

role_change_requests.description: Controlled workflow for role and permission matrix changes.

approval_policies.description: Configurable approval and dual approval policies for high-risk actions.

school_leads.description: Pre-onboarding CRM lead records for prospective schools.

school_lead_interactions.description: CRM activity log for contacts, demos, proposals and notes.

school_lead_import_batches.description: CSV/XLSX lead import batches with validation and duplicate reports.

school_lead_stage_events.description: Append-only stage-change and lifecycle history for school leads.

school_onboarding_cases.description: Internal onboarding workflow case for school verification, approval and activation.

school_onboarding_documents.description: Private optional/high-risk verification documents for school onboarding.

school_onboarding_events.description: Append-only onboarding timeline for verification, approval, activation and block/suspend actions.

school_status_controls.description: Controlled block/suspend/unblock state for approved/activated schools.

security_audit_events.description: Append-only canonical audit event store for all modules.

security_alerts.description: Security alerts from monitoring, drift detection, suspicious activity and policy violations.

staff_login_events.description: Staff login, session and failed-auth monitoring records.

permission_drift_findings.description: Detected permission, role and assignment-scope drift against approved baseline.

forensics_cases.description: Restricted investigation cases with evidence snapshot links.

security_events.description: Append-only security console lifecycle event ledger.

staff_profiles.description: Company staff profile linked to authenticated Directus user.

staff_invitations.description: Invite-only staff access records with token hash and expiry.

staff_assignment_scopes.description: Scoped assignments that constrain staff visibility and work queues.

staff_access_events.description: Append-only staff access lifecycle and security event ledger.

student_roster_batches.description: Staff-side control record for student roster uploads, validation, locking and downstream readiness.

student_roster_corrections.description: Controlled post-lock student roster correction workflow.

candidate_id_events.description: Append-only candidate ID generation, void and regeneration ledger.

student_roster_events.description: Append-only student roster lifecycle event ledger.

student_uploads.description: Bulk upload batch/file record for student CSV/XLSX intake and validation.

support_ticket_categories.description: Support ticket categories and default routing rules.

support_tickets.description: Primary support ticket records from school, staff or system.

support_ticket_messages.description: Threaded visible replies and staff-only internal notes.

support_ticket_attachments.description: Private ticket attachments with scoped access.

support_ticket_links.description: Links from tickets to safe summaries of business records.

support_ticket_escalations.description: Escalation records for category/module owner/security/operations review.

support_ticket_events.description: Append-only support ticket lifecycle event ledger.

task_queues.description: Work queues for module, role, approval, SLA, security, support and operations tasks.

task_assignments.description: Assignment and reassignment history for tasks.

task_dependencies.description: Dependencies between tasks and source module records.

task_sla_events.description: Append-only SLA state and breach events.
